---
id: get-experiment-config
title: "GetExperimentConfig"
description: "Retrieves the experiment configuration for a given workspace and organization. The response includes details of all experiment groups and experiments that match the specified filters."
sidebar_label: "GetExperimentConfig"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/experiment-config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the experiment configuration for a given workspace and organization. The response includes details of all experiment groups and experiments that match the specified filters.

  as={"h2"}
